title: What is your refund policy and time window?
content: You can request a refund within 7 days of delivery if the item is unused and in original packaging. Refunds are processed to the original payment method within 5–7 business days after the returned item passes inspection.

title: My item arrived damaged. What should I do?
content: Please raise a complaint within 48 hours of delivery and share photos/videos of the package and product. After verification, we can offer a free replacement or a refund (subject to stock availability).

title: I received the wrong item. How do I fix it?
content: Report the issue within 48 hours of delivery and share photos/videos of the package and product. After verification, we’ll arrange a free replacement or issue a refund as per your preference (subject to stock availability).

title: When are returns and exchanges accepted?
content: Returns and exchanges are accepted within 7 days of delivery for eligible products. Items must be unused, with tags (if applicable), and include all accessories. Exchanges depend on stock availability.

title: Which items are not eligible for return?
content: Certain categories like innerwear, perishables, and customized items are not eligible for return unless they were received damaged or incorrect.

title: My delivery is delayed. What options do I have?
content: If delivery is delayed beyond 5 days from the promised delivery date, you can request cancellation and a full refund (for prepaid orders). For COD orders, you may decline delivery. We can also escalate delayed shipments to the courier partner for priority resolution.

title: Can I cancel my order?
content: Orders can be cancelled before they are shipped. If an order has already shipped, cancellation isn’t guaranteed; for COD you can refuse delivery, and for prepaid you can initiate a return after delivery (subject to eligibility and timelines).

title: Are shipping charges refundable?
content: Shipping charges are refundable only if the return is due to our error (wrong item or damaged on arrival) or if the order was cancelled before shipment. For preference-based returns (where allowed), shipping charges may not be refundable.

title: Do you provide warranty or service support?
content: Warranty coverage depends on the brand’s warranty terms. We can help by sharing invoice details and guiding you to the service center process. Physical damage after delivery may not be covered unless reported within 48 hours as a damaged-on-arrival case.

title: When will my case be escalated to a human agent?
content: If an issue is not clearly covered by policy, requires account verification, or involves safety/legal concerns, it must be escalated to a senior/human support agent for manual handling.
